name: testValidateSignalInRangeByTxNode
title: testValidateSignalInRangeByTxNode
tables: Deprecated Function This function replaces the function testValidateSignalInRangeGM. Version 7.1: Replaced by testValidateSignalInRange.
long testValidateSignalInRangeByTxNode (char aTestStep[], dbSignal aSignal, dbNode aTxNode, float aLowLimit, float aHighLimit)
Checks the signal value against the condition: aLowLimit <= Value <= aHighLimit The test step is then evaluated as passed or failed, depending on the results
aTestStep Name of the test step for the test report
aSignal The signal to be polled
aTxNode Send node of the message whose signal should be polled
aLowLimit Lower limit of the signal value
aHighLimit Upper limit of the signal value
